sections.paragraph:
Original: תּצאה תּוצאה

Transliteration: tôtsâ'âh tôtsâ'âh

Phonetic: to-tsaw-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. outgoing, border, a going out, extremity, end, source, escape
    1. outgoing, extremity (of border)
    2. source (of life)
    3. escape (from death)

Origin: from H3318

TWOT entry: 893e

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
